body.title: Build audit-smell skill — post-code, pre-test code-quality layer
body.result: Built ~/.claude/skills/audit-smell/SKILL.md describing 17 checks (bare except, silent-return-False, shape-names, dead code, what-comments, mocked DB, speculative flags, new memory tables, SQLite, backcompat shims, speculative abstractions, base-class inheritance, module shared state, stale docstring, preferred_paths deprecated forms, fix-one-leave-many call-graph walk, diff drift). Severity HIGH/MED/LOW with HIGH blocking /sprint commit. Helper engine described: SmellEngine(IgorBase) at lab/claudecode/audit_smell_engine.py — implementation lands when this skill ships. Reuses existing audit_check_igorbase.py / audit_check_sqlite_imports.py / audit_check_bare_except.py. Skip on doc-only / audit-skip-smell tag; escalate to Opus on audit-emphasis-smell tag. Telemetry per standard shape, waits on T-audit-telemetry-shape. Tests: 3988 passed.
body.description:
New skill audit-smell — invoked after code edits, before tests run. Initial check set:
- Bare try/except without log line
- Silent-return-False / fanout=0 without WARNING
- Variable/function names that describe shape not purpose (tmp, data, process, result, do_thing)
- Dead code: unused imports, unreferenced helpers, commented-out blocks, bare pass
- New comments explaining WHAT (rule violation)
- Mocked DB in tests (incident-rooted rule)
- New feature flags / IGOR_*_ENABLED gates without go-live-when companion (no-speculative-flags)
- New memory tables (rule violation)
- SQLite / file-store fallbacks (rule violation)
- Backwards-compat shims for code without callers
- New abstractions for hypothetical futures
- Class without base-class inheritance (inherit-base-class rule)
- Shared state across functions without encapsulation (oop-first inverse)
- Top-of-file docstring stale on load-bearing edit
- Deprecated forms from preferred_paths palace rule
- Fix-one-leave-many: when signature/method changes, walk call graph and require diff touches all callers OR ticket declares 'first of N'
- Diff drift: ticket said touch X, diff touches Y too — AMEND-by-default (drift requires explicit ticket extension)

Emits per-run record. Model: Sonnet (Haiku misses too many).

Gated by diff-size threshold or ticket audit-emphasis tag — doesn't run on doc-only changes.

**Affected files:** new ~/.claude/skills/audit-smell/SKILL.md, palace check definitions at theigors/rules/audit_smell_checks/*. Helper at lab/claudecode/audit_smell_engine.py for call-graph walk + diff-drift detection.
**Design rules:** no persistence beyond palace telemetry. oop-first: SmellEngine class. docs-in-code: top-of-file docstring on audit_smell_engine.py.
**Test plan:** seed a diff with a bare try/except → flagged. Diff with renamed signature touching 1/5 callers → fix-one-leave-many fires. Diff drift on file-not-in-ticket → AMEND. Mocked-DB test in diff → flagged. Telemetry recorded.
